variants.name: MULTI-BAY-BTB-2
variants.notes: Beam to beam joins and seals each bay to each bay required if more then one bay then 1 per bay if 2 bays 1 if 3 bays 2 on an and on (not required for a single bay)

variants.name: MULTI-BAY-PTG-2
variants.notes: Required for multi-bay gutter continuity - Pass-Through Gutter Reinforcement Package(allows water to pass from one bay to the next this is mandatory for any multi bay more than one bay and each additional after that so 2 bay gets one 3 bays gets 2 and on and on

variants.name: PW-STR-POST
variants.notes: Additional Privacy Wall Post Requoired if no post on other side

variants.name: PW-STR-VCB
variants.notes: VERTICAL CENTER BEAM For any dimension over 10', a center beam is required to avoid sagging.

variants.name: PW-STY-NG
variants.notes: No Gap / Solid Wall

productName: azenco system structure posts, beams, headers

variants.name: ARC-BPC2
variants.notes: One required per post

variants.name: FAN-BEAM15ft
variants.notes: Used for fans or accessories up to 15'

variants.name: FAN-BEAM23ft
variants.notes: Used for fans or accessories up to 23'

variants.name: Footings-1
variants.notes: If selected default per post each requires 1 footing unless pecified otherwise, Min price 1500 if only 1 footing threshold met then individually prices each

variants.name: STR-HDR-30
variants.notes: Required only if uninterrupted span >23' and no center post up to 30’ total span = 2 posts this repeats after 30’+ to 53’ & 60’

variants.name: STR-POST-6.5x6.5
variants.notes: Mandatory per post selected

variants.name: STR-POST-8x8M
variants.notes: Min Price if trheshold under 2 to price as 1600

variants.name: AUTO-BOND-2
variants.notes: Required for motorized operation & Shade Control, Lights Controls, Heater Controls (infratech only) Optional only on r-shade and R-breeze (mandatory on r-blade) Offer remote trouble shooting

variants.name: AUTO-REMOTE-2
variants.notes: Physical remote for pergola operation Mandatory on all systems

variants.name: FOOTINGS-2-MIN-PLUS

variants.name: CTRL-AZ-1R
variants.notes:
IF Infratech recessed heaters selected: 
IF heater_qty = 1 OR 2→ heater_beam_qty = 1
IF heater_qty = 3 OR 4→ heater_beam_qty = 2
IF heater_qty > 4→ heater_beam_qty = ceil(heater_qty ÷ 2)

variants.notes: Up to 2 heaters

variants.notes: Up to 4 heaters

variants.name: HTR-IF-REC-4KW
variants.notes: Max 2 Heaters Per Beam & 16-Amps Per Heater

variants.name: INST-PW-ADD

variants.name: INST-PW-BASE
variants.notes: Privacy wall installation is separate from pergola installation. The first wall uses the base install rate; each additional wall uses the additional wall rate. Charges do not scale by square footage or bay count.

variants.name: RB-COLOR-ALL-BLK
variants.notes: Factory color upgrade for louvers. Flat surcharge per bay. Mutually exclusive with other louver colors. Dealer discount does not apply.

variants.name: RB-COLOR-ALL-GRY
variants.notes: Factory color upgrade for louvers. Flat surcharge per bay. Mutually exclusive with other louver colors. Dealer discount does not apply.

variants.name: RB-COLOR-ALL-WHT
variants.notes: Standard factory finish. No surcharge. Dealer discount does not apply.

variants.name: RB-FRM-CUSTOM
variants.notes: Factory-applied frame finish. Percentage surcharge applies to full base pergola price (all bays). Mutually exclusive with other frame finishes. Dealer discount does not apply.

variants.name: RB-FRM-WOOD-GRAIN
variants.notes: Factory-applied frame finish. Percentage surcharge applies to full base pergola price (all bays). Mutually exclusive with other frame finishes. Dealer discount does not apply.

variants.name: RB-LVR-CHERRY-TXT
variants.notes: Factory louver finish. Surcharge applies per square foot of pergola area. Mutually exclusive with other louver colors. Dealer discount does not apply.

variants.name: RB-LVR-CUSTOM-COLOR
variants.notes: Factory louver finish. Surcharge applies per square foot of pergola area. Mutually exclusive with other louver colors. Dealer discount does not apply.

variants.name: RB-LVR-WOOD-GRAIN
variants.notes: Factory louver finish. Surcharge applies per square foot of pergola area. Mutually exclusive with other louver colors. Dealer discount does not apply.

variants.name: R-Shade-Coff-Ceiling-Support-pkg
variants.notes: Applies to each bay when width exceeds 16' by any increment. 1 per bay includes 3-4 fan beams, Crown Molding, Support Elements for Deflection *we always prefer multi-bay if possible in widths of 16' but if they want this these get added per bay mandatory

variants.name: Variable-test-6
variants.notes: Allow a limited sudo command (no password) for a non-root user (recommended).If you’re staying as root, you can skip, but safer is:create user deploy and only allow that script.Webhook endpoint options:Best: use GitHub/CI to SSH and run restart_import_app.shIf you insist on HTTP webhook: put it behind nginx with Basic Auth and point it to a tiny internal handler (or use a tool like webhook binary). I can give you the exact nginx+webhook config you want.
